access.guest_fallback_message: Detailed explanations are available for logged-in Saola students only.

q28.explanation: Câu 28 khớp với thông tin ở đoạn 2. Ý chính trong bài là: "Monarch butterflies use scent for communicating and the males draw females to mate by discharging chemicals from scent glands in their rear wings. Once together, breeding takes place and the female lays the eggs on milkweed plants. In the second stage, the eggs hatch into caterpillars, called “larvae”.". Vì câu hỏi diễn đạt lại cùng một ý, đáp án là TRUE.
q28.evidence: Monarch butterflies use scent for communicating and the males draw females to mate by discharging chemicals from scent glands in their rear wings. Once together, breeding takes place and the female lays the eggs on milkweed plants. In the second stage, the eggs hatch into caterpillars, called “larvae”._

q30.explanation: Câu 30 mâu thuẫn với thông tin ở đoạn 2. Bài nêu: "Although from the outside the 10 days of the chrysalis phase may appear to be a time when nothing is happening, it is a time of rapid change. Within the chrysalis the body parts of the caterpillar undergo a remarkable transformation to become the beautiful parts that make up the butterfly that emerges. Finally, the monarch butterfly emerges from the chrysalis and flies away, feeding on flowers and enjoying the short life it has left, which is only a month to 6 weeks.". Câu hỏi đã đổi một chi tiết quan trọng hoặc đảo ngược ý trong bài, nên đáp án là FALSE.
q30.evidence: Although from the outside the 10 days of the chrysalis phase may appear to be a time when nothing is happening, it is a time of rapid change. Within the chrysalis the body parts of the caterpillar undergo a remarkable transformation to become the beautiful parts that make up the butterfly that emerges. Finally, the monarch butterfly emerges from the chrysalis and flies away, feeding on flowers and enjoying the short life it has left, which is only a month to 6 weeks._

q31.explanation: Câu 31 có một số từ khóa gần với đoạn 2, nhưng bài không cung cấp đủ chi tiết để xác nhận hay phủ định toàn bộ mệnh đề. Câu gần nhất là: "Although from the outside the 10 days of the chrysalis phase may appear to be a time when nothing is happening, it is a time of rapid change. Within the chrysalis the body parts of the caterpillar undergo a remarkable transformation to become the beautiful parts that make up the butterfly that emerges. Finally, the monarch butterfly emerges from the chrysalis and flies away, feeding on flowers and enjoying the short life it has left, which is only a month to 6 weeks.". Vì thiếu thông tin trực tiếp, đáp án là NOT GIVEN.
q31.evidence: Although from the outside the 10 days of the chrysalis phase may appear to be a time when nothing is happening, it is a time of rapid change. Within the chrysalis the body parts of the caterpillar undergo a remarkable transformation to become the beautiful parts that make up the butterfly that emerges. Finally, the monarch butterfly emerges from the chrysalis and flies away, feeding on flowers and enjoying the short life it has left, which is only a month to 6 weeks._

q32.explanation: Câu 32 khớp với thông tin ở đoạn 3. Ý chính trong bài là: "Every November, monarch butterflies arrive in their preferred breeding environment in central Mexico to spend the winter, having spent around 2 months travelling up to 2,800 miles across fields, mountains, deserts and seas from Canada and the United States. Due to the long distances, monarch butterflies breed as they travel, with none of those setting off ever arriving at their destination.". Vì câu hỏi diễn đạt lại cùng một ý, đáp án là TRUE.
q32.evidence: Every November, monarch butterflies arrive in their preferred breeding environment in central Mexico to spend the winter, having spent around 2 months travelling up to 2,800 miles across fields, mountains, deserts and seas from Canada and the United States. Due to the long distances, monarch butterflies breed as they travel, with none of those setting off ever arriving at their destination._

q33.explanation: Câu 33 có một số từ khóa gần với đoạn 4, nhưng bài không cung cấp đủ chi tiết để xác nhận hay phủ định toàn bộ mệnh đề. Câu gần nhất là: "However, in the most recent migration, fewer of the orange- and red-winged monarchs made it to the end of the journey than ever before. The monarch butterfly population in Mexico was the lowest in 20 years, according to research just released by the WWF-Telcel Alliance and the monarch butterfly Biosphere Reserve Office of the Mexican government. The start of the arrival of the breeding pairs prompted the beginning of the research that showed a 43.7 per cent decrease (nearly three acres) in the total amount of forestland occupied by monarchs in and near Mexico’s monarch butterfly Biosphere Reserve, and a similar decrease in the number of butterflies in the area.". Vì thiếu thông tin trực tiếp, đáp án là NOT GIVEN.
q33.evidence: However, in the most recent migration, fewer of the orange- and red-winged monarchs made it to the end of the journey than ever before. The monarch butterfly population in Mexico was the lowest in 20 years, according to research just released by the WWF-Telcel Alliance and the monarch butterfly Biosphere Reserve Office of the Mexican government. The start of the arrival of the breeding pairs prompted the beginning of the research that showed a 43.7 per cent decrease (nearly three acres) in the total amount of forestland occupied by monarchs in and near Mexico’s monarch butterfly Biosphere Reserve, and a similar decrease in the number of butterflies in the area._
